title: Shadows Stolen on Thriller Bark
description: In the Thriller Bark storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #3, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Hogback, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5 as the scene develops across pages 1–4.
scene: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Unknown person #3, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Hogback, Unknown person #4, focusing on the immediate stakes of shadows stolen on thriller bark.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ... he's strong ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: ... damn, there's no way that's Sanji...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: for him to even kick Robin...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: This guy isn't Sanji anymore.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Who is this "SANji"?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I'll take him down, you fucking bastard...!!

dialogue.speaker: Hogback
dialogue.text: FOS FOS FOS... unfortunately, they...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: They don't have any human emotions left...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: For zombies, a command is "Absolute"!!

dialogue.speaker: Hogback
dialogue.text: Well, cindry-chan, put an end to them!!

dialogue.speaker: Hogback
dialogue.text: Yes.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: ... you've felt quite good...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Being a villain, Hogback !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ... hmmm!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I respected you as a doctor...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: who saved the lives of many people.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: and that zombie research of yours...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Only a few minutes is enough ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It only causes trouble, so much trouble!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Who You Respect Is Your Own Choice...
